title: Creamy Norwegian Soup
description: A delicious and comforting soup made with Norwegian ingredients. This creamy soup is perfect for a cold winter's day.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: Heavy cream adds a rich and creamy texture to the soup.

ingredients.name: Chicken Broth
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium broth for a healthier option

instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Norwegian cod and cook for 2-3 minutes, until opaque.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the cod is cooked through.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the soup has thickened slightly.
Stir in the flour to thicken the soup.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives if desired.
